## Impact

- [ ] **Critical** — data loss, security vulnerability, or complete service outage
- [ ] **High** — core workflow broken for multiple users
- [ ] **Medium** — feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] **Low** — cosmetic or minor inconvenience
